title: Where Is My Compass?
description: Makes it so the map item now has compass next to it - only logical, since compass is used in crafting a map! NO MODS NEEDED!
body:
**Where does compass go, it it's used in map crafting?**

![Image of crafting a map in vanilla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f21b89b93a0ffd572cbb73911ea465581c626a3.png)





**What does this pack do?**

This resource pack changes map model to include compass in it. Now you can have both, a map and a compass! No more compass-stealing by the game!

NO MODS NEEDED! This pack uses new vanilla structure for items and will work on any Minecraft client starting 1.21.4!

## Behold!
![Image of an updated item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41bf9e2898fedc81a07b6d23406170700a639385.png)

![Gif animation of using a map-compass](https://i.imgur.com/GxhIlsQ.gif)

---

Anybody is free to use this pack anywhere. Just do not rename the pack, please.
